data.body: Eliminate the built-in compatibility path where workflow action prompts fall back to static skills or non-Loom definitions. Ship the default Knots workflow as a Loom bundle and make claim/poll/skill resolution use workflow-installed Loom prompt bodies for built-in and custom workflows alike. Preserve multiple workflow installation and selection behavior, and remove dead compatibility branches once the Loom path is authoritative.
data.title: Remove compatibility prompt/runtime fallback
